name: Scalloped Ham and Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to boiling.
2. Peel the potatoes and thinly slice them. Place the slices in a bowl of cold water as you slice.
3. Drain the potato slices and reserve.
4. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
5. Coat the inside of a 12x7x2-inch or other 2-1/2 to 3-quart baking dish with nonstick cooking spray.
6. In a medium saucepan, stir together 1/2 cup milk and flour until smooth.
7. Stir in the remaining 1 cup milk, half-and-half, water, vegetable broth powder, thyme, salt, and pepper. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the sauce thickens and bubbles, about 3 minutes.
8. Spoon one-third of the potato slices into the prepared baking dish. Sprinkle with half of the ham and green onions. Spoon on one-third of the sauce. Repeat layers. The top layer should be potatoes with the remaining sauce poured over all.
9. Bake, covered, in the preheated oven for 30 minutes.
10. Sprinkle cheese over the top and add paprika if desired. Continue baking, uncovered, for 15 more minutes or until lightly browned. Let stand 10 minutes before serving.
